name: search_endpoints
description: Search for Polygon.io API endpoints by query. Returns a list of matching endpoints with their descriptions and parameters.

query.description: Search query to find relevant API endpoints (e.g., 'stock price', 'options chain', 'forex')

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10)

name: get_endpoint_docs
description: Get detailed documentation for a specific Polygon.io API endpoint including all parameters and response schema.

name: call_api
description: Execute a Polygon.io REST API call and store the result as a DataFrame for subsequent SQL queries.

endpoint.description: The API endpoint path to call

params.description: Query parameters for the API call (e.g., ticker, date range, multiplier)

dataframe_name.description: Name to store the result DataFrame under for later SQL queries

name: query_data
description: Run SQL queries against DataFrames stored from previous call_api results. Use standard SQL syntax to filter, aggregate, and analyze the data.

sql.description: SQL query to run against stored DataFrames (e.g., 'SELECT * FROM prices WHERE close > 100')

dataframe_names.description: List of DataFrame names to make available for the SQL query
